key_finding: Input-number confound RULED OUT: V|nums_R = 0.357 at position 2.5% (text reveals 0%), positive at 19/20 bins, peak 0.497 (p=0.01). V carries genuine forward-looking info beyond visible text numbers. Confound is real (nums_R=0.35) but V goes far beyond it. K|nums also substantial (0.04-0.39).
evidence_impact: Phase 2 natural_usage revised from MODERATE-STRONG to STRONG. Position-sweep now has both raw decodability (exp_083) and numbers-controlled decodability (exp_084). Combined with per-operation V|nums (Qwen/Phi) and WRRA (Qwen/Phi), Phase 2 has 4 methodologies on 2 model families.
next_planned: Cross-model position-sweep nums control on Phi. Or paraphrase disruption (Experiment B). Or paper-ready combined figure.

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL: 8 angles. K spectral geometry uniform across heads. V spectral differentiates.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE + SPECTRAL: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama.

natural_usage.status: STRONG (revised UP): Input-number confound RULED OUT (Exp 084: V|nums=0.36 at 2.5%, p=0.01); position-sweep gap 25-80% (Exp 083); V|nums on 2 families (Qwen R=0.24, Phi R=0.19); WRRA on 2 families (Phi 87.5%, Qwen 71.4%). 4 methodologies, 2 model families.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE for Phase 1 (4 families). Phase 2: V|nums on 2 families (Qwen, Phi). WRRA on 2 families. Position sweep on Qwen only (needs Phi replication).
